{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mark of Profanity
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10701
|idx=59
|description="No god may be profaned — and neither may the beings of legend!" — Chronicles of the Griffon
|skill=Unleash a domain, absorbing 36% of the enemy's ATK, and reflect the absorbed DMG back to the enemy!
|hp=2510
|def=206
|atk=225
|rush=388
|gene1=Per orange or higher organ equipped, {race} DEF +42
Orange or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=Stonehide RES +4%
|gene3=Per orange or higher organ equipped, {race} HP +420
Orange or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene4=In Demon Form, {race} ATK +140
|gene5=In Demon Form, Fire DMG +240
|gene6=Chance of Breaking Enemy +4%
|gene7=Chance of Breaking Enemy +4% (Awakened)
|}}
